description_long: This is a wall-mounted sconce featuring a cylindrical white candle set in a gold-toned metallic holder. The sconce has a rounded, ornate arm that extends from a circular wall plate, supporting the candle above a broad, flared drip tray. The metallic body is smooth and polished, with subtle decorative ridges and curves that give it a classic, elegant appearance. The candle is unadorned and appears to be made of wax, with a visible flame at the top. The gold finish of the metal contrasts with the plain white candle, creating a visually striking yet traditional look. This fixture is designed to be both functional and decorative, suitable for urban exteriors or interiors seeking a touch of vintage charm.
description: A gold-toned, wall-mounted sconce with a white candle and ornate, classic design. The fixture features a polished metallic arm and a broad drip tray supporting the candle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the ornate gold arm, circular wall plate, and the white candle with a visible flame.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical design, broad drip tray, and centered candle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the arm and candle from the other direction.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the circular wall plate and the back of the sconce's arm.
attribute_fixture_design: The sconce features a vintage, classic design with ornate curves and a polished gold finish, evoking traditional European influences. Its elegant form and broad drip tray add to its decorative appeal.
